cases.title: SaaS App Build
cases.prompt: Build a SaaS app with authentication, dashboard, and Stripe billing. Include backend API, runnable preview, and deploy-ready output.

cases.title: Admin Dashboard Build
cases.prompt: Build an admin dashboard with CRUD operations, filters, analytics charts, and backend endpoints.

cases.title: Landing and Backend Integration
cases.prompt: Build a landing page with form capture and backend email integration with validation and confirmation flow.

cases.title: Broken App Repair
cases.prompt: Fix this broken app and make it run correctly. Detect root cause, apply repair, and verify runtime status.

cases.title: Resume Interrupted Build
cases.prompt: Start implementing a project build plan, then pause after planning with explicit checkpoints for continuation.
cases.resume_prompt: Resume from prior checkpoints without restarting, continue implementation, and report continuity decisions.

cases.title: What-if Strategy Comparison
cases.prompt: Compare two approaches for building this app and recommend the best one with confidence and tradeoffs.

cases.title: Deploy and Verify
cases.prompt: Deploy this app and verify it works. Include deployment readiness checks, runtime validation, and final status.
